changes.title: Tier A regulation refresh
changes.description: Updated Tier A species (summer flounder, scallop, bluefin tuna, swordfish, sandbar/blacktip sharks) from NOAA bulletins and Framework 39. Bluefin June/July retention limits split; scallop access area trip limits; swordfish charter limits.

changes.title: Bluefin Tuna Jan 2026 closure
changes.description: General Category commercial BFT closure Jan 14 - Mar 31, 2026

verification.note: Tier A updates verified against NOAA bulletins listed in changes[].sources. Always confirm current quotas/closures before enforcement actions.
